query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS logo_generations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  logo_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  prompt TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_logo_gen_tenant (tenant_company_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS logo_generations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  logo_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  prompt TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_logo_gen_tenant (tenant_company_id)
);
